messages.content: 你好
你好！有什么我可以为你效劳的吗？
可以帮我中英互译吗
当然可以！请问有哪些需要翻译的内容呢？
今天的天气很好
Today's weather is very good.
请问您还有需要翻译的吗？
Today’s weather is very good.
今天的天气很好。
Top-p (nucleus sampling)
Top-p（核心采样）
Status code from OpenAI server
OpenAI服务器的状态码
This app provides you full access to GPT-3.5 (4096 token limit). You don't need any OPENAI API key.
这个应用程序为您提供完全访问 GPT-3.5（4096 令牌限制）。您不需要任何 OPENAI API 密钥。
Due to high demand, I'm experiencing issues briefly. Please try again later or use the All tab to get an answer in the meantime.
由于需求量很大，我目前正在暂时出现问题。请稍后再试或使用“全部”选项卡在此期间获取答案。
Today's popular stock codes have been selected, with expected returns of 15%. Friends who are interested in participating can contact me to get the stock codes and trading strategies.是什么意思
今天选择了一些受欢迎的股票代码，预计回报率为 15%。有兴趣参与的朋友们可以联系我获取股票代码和交易策略。

Welcome new and old stock investors to join the Platinum Stock Discussion Group! I am Alice, Professor Kevin Grogan's assistant. It's nice to meet you all! Our group analyst, Professor Kevin Grogan, is currently the Chief Investment Officer of Platinum and has 20 years of experience in US stock trading. In this group, we will share our thoughts on stocks with you! A friendly reminder: this group does not involve any illegal investments, only stock exchanges. As friends continue to join, the group is temporarily not open for comments. Thank you for your understanding. Recently, the market situation is not good, so it is important to pay attention to the current market trends and market conditions. If you want to learn more, please click the link below to contact Professor Kevin. If you also have non-performing stocks in your portfolio, we can help you analyze and diagnose them. The group discussion has not yet begun, thank you for your understanding.翻译成中文

欢迎新老股票投资者加入“铂金股票讨论群”！我是Alice，Kevin Grogan教授的助手。很高兴见到大家！我们的分析师、Kevin Grogan教授目前是铂金的首席投资官，在美国股票交易方面拥有20年的经验。在这个群里，我们将与您分享股票方面的想法！友情提示：本群不涉及任何非法投资，只涉及股票交易。由于朋友们不断加入，目前暂不开放评论。感谢您的理解。最近市场形势不好，所以关注当前市场趋势和市场状况非常重要。如果您想了解更多信息，请点击下面的链接联系Kevin教授。如果您的投资组合中还有没有表现的股票，我们可以帮助您分析和诊断。群讨论尚未开始，感谢您的理解。

Welcome new and old stock investors to the [Buckingham] Stock Investment Club! I am Alice, Professor Kevin Grogan's assistant, and I am delighted to meet you all. Our team of analysts, led by Professor Kevin Grogan, the current Chief Investment Officer of [Buckingham], has 20 years of experience in trading US stocks. We are here to share our insights on stocks with you all. 

A friendly reminder: this group does not involve any illegal investments, only stock exchange. As more friends join, we will temporarily not open the floor for discussion. Thank you for your understanding. 

In the current market downturn, it is crucial to pay attention to the market trends and conditions. If you would like to learn more, please click on the link below to contact Professor Kevin. We can also help you analyze and diagnose any underperforming stocks in your investment portfolio. Our group discussions have not yet begun, thank you for your understanding.翻译成中文

欢迎新老股票投资者加入[Buckingham]股票投资俱乐部！我是Alice，Kevin Grogan教授的助手，很高兴认识大家。我们的团队由Kevin Grogan教授领导，他是[Buckingham]的现任首席投资官，在美国股票交易方面拥有20年的经验。我们在这里与大家分享股票见解。

友情提示：本群不涉及任何非法投资，只涉及股票交易。随着越来越多的朋友加入，我们暂时不开放讨论。感谢您的理解。

在当前的市场下跌中，关注市场趋势和条件非常重要。如果您想了解更多，请点击下面的链接联系Kevin教授。我们还可以帮助您分析和诊断投资组合中不表现的股票。我们的群组讨论尚未开始，感谢您的理解。

Welcome new and old stock investors to the [Buckingham] Stock Investment Club! I am Alice, Professor Kevin Grogan's assistant, and I am delighted to meet you all. Our team of analysts, led by Kevin Grogan, the current Chief Investment Officer of [Buckingham], has 20 years of experience in trading US stocks. We are here to share our insights on stocks with you all.

A friendly reminder: this group does not involve any illegal investments, only stock exchange. The group discussions have not yet begun, and we are still welcoming new members. 

In the current market downturn, it is crucial to pay attention to the market trends and conditions. If you would like to learn more, please click on the link below to contact Professor Kevin. We can also help you analyze and diagnose any underperforming stocks in your investment portfolio. Thank you for your understanding.翻译成中文

欢迎新老股票投资者加入[Buckingham]股票投资俱乐部！我是Alice，Kevin Grogan教授的助手，很高兴认识大家。我们的团队由Kevin Grogan领导，他是[Buckingham]的现任首席投资官，在美国股票交易方面拥有20年的经验。我们在这里与大家分享股票见解。

友情提示：本群不涉及任何非法投资，只涉及股票交易。群组讨论尚未开始，我们正在欢迎新成员。

在当前的市场下跌中，关注市场趋势和条件非常重要。如果您想了解更多，请点击下面的链接联系Kevin教授。我们还可以帮助您分析和诊断投资组合中不表现的股票。感谢您的理解。

This group is a stock exchange group that provides the latest policies, news, information, professional financial morning reports, market reviews, market trends, stock recommendations, individual stock tracking services, stock investment courses, and professional investment plans. We aim to ensure the safety of your principal while maximizing profits. You can first assess our capabilities and then consider cooperation for mutual benefit.

Leave a message for Professor Kevin Grogan to receive the stock code for an expected return of 15%+ and all the benefits of our group.翻译成中文

该群是一个股票交流群，提供最新的政策、新闻、信息、专业的财经晨报、市场回顾、市场趋势、股票推荐、个股跟踪服务、股票投资课程和专业的投资计划。我们的目标是确保您的本金安全，同时最大化收益。您可以先评估我们的能力，然后考虑合作互惠。

给Kevin Grogan教授留言，以获取预期回报率为 15%+ 的股票代码和我们群组的所有优惠。
